title: Cobblemon ThePokeRealm
description: Designed for smooth performance and immersion, it keeps things simple while adding just enough to enrich the Cobblemon experience.
body:
The official modpack of ThePokeRealm - Fabric 1.21.1!
[Discord Link](https://discord.gg/thepokerealm)
Server IP: play.thepokerealm.net

ThePokeRealm [Official Modpack] is a lightweight Cobblemon experience tailored for performance, immersion, and quality-of-life improvements. Built specifically for players on ThePokeRealm server, this pack enhances the core gameplay without overwhelming you with unnecessary mods.

Whether you're exploring, battling, or building, everything included is carefully chosen to support a smooth and engaging Cobblemon journey.

_Modify for personal use only. Redistribution or republishing is not permitted._

NON-P2W Cosmetics Store: https://store.thepokerealm.net/

**Let's talk about our wide array of features, what do we offer?**

 - ZERO P2W 
 - ZERO GAMBLING
 - Mega Evolution
 - Dynamax
 - Terastallization
 - Z-Moves
 - Breeding
 - Jobs
 - Mounts
 - Lures
 - GTS
 - Daily Rewards
 - TM's & Move Tutors
 - Custom World Generation
 - Keep Inventory
 - Land Claims
 - Map Icons for Pokémon

_
Alongside this our team and myself are active in the server and within the community listening to the players for what to improve! There has never been a better time to join our community, I'll see you in the long grass trainer!_
